title: Minecraft Life Steal
description: Experience the thrill of classic RPGs as you siphon health from defeated foes, turning their demise into your power!
body:
![thumbnail](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f5565138a7b4a88cc07adc708fca6e2e094a7a93_0.webp)
### Unleash your inner warrior with the Life Steal datapack! Steal health from your enemies, enhancing your survival and transforming their demise into your strength.

## Variable Health Gain:
The amount of health you gain is proportional to the maximum health of the defeated mob. The stronger the foe, the more health you receive!

## Regeneration Effect: 
Upon killing an enemy, you will receive a regeneration effect, allowing you to heal over time and sustain your adventures.

## Dynamic RPG Experience:
Feel the thrill of classic RPG mechanics as you absorb life from your foes, making each kill a strategic advantage in your journey.

## Uninstalling
Ready to say goodbye to the Datapack? No problem! Simply follow these **simple steps**:

1. Access the Chat Window.
2. Enter the Uninstall Command and press Enter: 
```
/function life_steal:uninstall
```
3. You can now remove it safely from the Datapacks folder, every trace of the datapack has been removed.

### Additional Notes
- Compatible with all other datapacks, following the standard conventions.
- This datapack was coded using JMC
